overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a military uniform walking through a grand institutional building with columns and balconies, transitioning through narrow corridors, and ending at a waiting area with seating. The environment features warm artificial lighting and Soviet-era architectural styling.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious grand lobby with high ceilings and large support columns. An NPC is visible walking along the upper balcony. The space features warm lighting from wall sconces and a glass skylight visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with staircase and mesh windows

events.description: enters narrow corridor from grand lobby, passing staircase on left side

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow corridor alongside the staircase with mesh windows

entered.detail: staircase with red railing running parallel to the corridor
wire-mesh covered windows showing dark exterior
horizontal fluorescent light fixture on wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow corridor with a staircase on the left and mesh-covered windows showing the dark exterior. The lighting is dimmer and more enclosed compared to the grand lobby.

scene_state.functional_zone: waiting area with seating and large wooden door

events.description: passes another uniformed character standing in doorway on the left
enters waiting area with couches and benches visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down corridor, passing an NPC, and entering the waiting area approaching the final door

notable_agents.action: standing in doorway watching the ego character pass by

entered.detail: upholstered bench seating against the far wall
tall wooden door with metal signage above
framed poster or notice on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the final stretch of corridor, passing an NPC standing in a doorway, and enters a waiting area with benches and a large wooden door at the far end. The space opens up slightly compared to the narrow corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand, airy institutional lobby into a series of increasingly enclosed corridors that eventually open into a quiet waiting area. It begins in a spacious hall characterized by high ceilings, massive support columns, and warm light emanating from wall sconces and an overhead skylight, while an NPC moves along an upper balcony. As the character advances, the environment shifts abruptly into a dim, narrow corridor where the openness of the lobby is replaced by mesh-covered windows looking out into the dark exterior and a staircase to the left. The camera then follows the character through the final stretch of this confined passage, passing an NPC stationed in a doorway before the space expands once more. Finally, the movement concludes as the character enters a waiting area furnished with benches and a large wooden door at the far end.
